questions.statement:
<p>Choose the option that best transforms the sentence into its Indirect form:</p>

<p>&ldquo;Would you like a drink?&rdquo;</p>
options: He asked me if I would like a drink. /

questions.statement:
<p dir="ltr"><strong>Identify the best option to fill in the blank.</strong></p>

<p dir="ltr">The sudden _____ in the weather disrupted their plans.</p>
options: <span id="docs-internal-guid-5d767643-7fff-0211-8d0b-12427ea10c95"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Improvement</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-a05ca203-7fff-1fe1-a625-671b9d99b869"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Change</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-16876290-7fff-28f9-1da3-42e67ff26c7b"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Decline</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-a072a524-7fff-3312-80b2-925707d8c00a"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Stabilization</span></span> /

questions.statement:
<p><strong>Directions: Select the correct passive form of the given sentence.&nbsp;</strong></p>

<p>Light a candle in the memory of the brave martyrs.</p>
options: Let a candle be lit in the memory of the brave martyrs. /
A candle has been lit in the memory of the brave martyrs. /
A candle is lit by us in the memory of the brave martyrs. /
A candle will be lighted in the memory of the brave martyrs. /

questions.statement: Which of the following words is the antonym of the word &#39;Auspicious&#39;?
<strong>In the following question, four words are given out of which one word is incorrectly spelt. Find the incorrectly spelt word.</strong>
questions.explanation: The word given in option 4 has been spelled incorrectly. The correct spelling is &lsquo;dysentery&rsquo;.

questions.statement:
<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>KNOWLEDGE</p>

<p><strong>Select the word segment that substitutes (replaces) the bracketed word segment correctly and completes the sentence meaningfully. Select the option &#39;no correction required&#39; if the sentence is correct as given.</strong></p>

<p>Disaster has also befallen (many a golfers at this hole.)</p>
options: many a golfer at this hole. /
many an golfer at this hole. /

questions.statement:
<strong>Select the most appropriate option to substitute the underlined segment in the given&nbsp;sentence. If there is no need to substitute it, select No improvement.</strong><br />
The teacher expected the students <u><strong>had finishing</strong></u> the project on time.
